expectations.text: outputs/repo/web/AGENTS.md includes the serial web test command.
expectations.evidence:
# AGENTS.md

Web package guidance.

- After changing anything in `web/`, run `pnpm --dir web test -- --runInBand`.
- Keep web test runs serial because shared fixtures fail in parallel.

expectations.text: outputs/repo/api/AGENTS.md includes the schema validation command.
expectations.evidence:
# AGENTS.md

API package guidance.

- API contract details live under `api/`.
- After editing `api/schema/*.json`, run `python3 scripts/validate_schema.py`.

expectations.text: outputs/repo/AGENTS.md is shorter than the source root AGENTS.md and no longer owns the moved scoped commands.
expectations.evidence:
# AGENTS.md

Project uses `pnpm` and `python3`.

- Keep this root file short and project-wide.
- `web/AGENTS.md` - web test workflow and fixture constraints.
- `api/AGENTS.md` - API contract and schema validation workflow.

expectations.text: outputs/report.md includes Moved guidance and Grouped files.
expectations.evidence:
# Learnings

- Durable: `web/` test runs must be serial; use `pnpm --dir web test -- --runInBand`.
- Durable: after editing `api/schema/*.json`, run `python3 scripts/validate_schema.py`.
- Durable: keep root `AGENTS.md` prompt-light and move scoped workflow details closer to owning folders.
- Excluded as non-durable: "repo has a README".

# Applied updates

- Copied fixture repo to `outputs/repo/`.
- Refactored `outputs/repo/AGENTS.md` to keep only project-wide routing guidance.
- Added scoped guidance files:
  - `outputs/repo/web/AGENTS.md`
  - `outputs/repo/api/AGENTS.md`
- Updated web test command to the corrected durable form with `-- --runInBand`.

# Moved guidance

| From | To | Guidance |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `outputs/repo/AGENTS.md` | `outputs/repo/web/AGENTS.md` | web test command + serial fixture constraint |
| `outputs/repo/AGENTS.md` | `outputs/repo/api/AGENTS.md` | schema validation command + API contract location note |

# Grouped files

- Root (project-wide only): `outputs/repo/AGENTS.md`
- Web scoped guidance: `outputs/repo/web/AGENTS.md`
- API scoped guidance: `outputs/repo/api/AGENTS.md`
